heading: Enactment and consent of the United States
label: 40313 Enactment and consent of the United States
text: The National Crime Prevention and Privacy Compact, as set forth in , is enacted into law and entered into by the Federal Government. The consent of Congress is given to States to enter into the Compact.section 40316 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 14613 of Title 42
